_meta.howToUse: Ten phrasings that should cause an agent with this skill installed to invoke growth-machine, and ten phrasings that sound adjacent but should not. Use this to grade the skill's frontmatter `description` (skill/SKILL.md) for trigger precision: feed each query to a fresh agent that has the skill available and check whether it reaches for growth-machine or not, against the `should_trigger` flag. A false negative on a should_trigger query means the description is under-triggering (real users asking for this will not get it). A false positive on a should_trigger:false query means the description is over-triggering (the skill fires on unrelated marketing or generic creative requests, wasting the agent's ten-station pipeline on something that did not ask for it). `reason` explains the judgment call for each query.

queries.query: run the growth machine on the olympics opening ceremony
queries.reason: names the skill directly

queries.query: let's run a wave for our new product launch moment
queries.reason: core trigger phrase "run a wave"

queries.query: /growth-machine the super bowl halftime show
queries.reason: slash-command trigger

queries.query: take this moment and run it through asset x new element
queries.reason: invokes the formula by name

queries.query: start a new growth machine wave on mercury retrograde
queries.reason: combines both core trigger phrases

queries.query: here's a trending topic, give me 3 creative variants and a test plan for it
queries.reason: describes the pipeline's actual output shape without naming it, matches the description's "pastes a moment and asks for creative variants plus a test plan" clause

queries.query: continue the wedding moment, run the next wave
queries.reason: continuing-a-moment flow, learn last

queries.query: I want the ten-station pipeline: insight, brief, naming, plan, produce, judge, simulate, decide, rollout, learn, on this news event
queries.reason: names the station list verbatim

queries.query: give this moment the SCALE/KILL/ITERATE treatment
queries.reason: names the machine-made verdict the skill is known for

queries.query: growth machine wave 3 on the same topic as last time
queries.reason: core trigger phrase plus continuation

queries.query: what's a good growth marketing strategy for a B2B SaaS company
queries.reason: general strategy question, no moment, no request for variants/test plan; belongs to 30x-growth-marketing-panel or growth-engine, not this skill

queries.query: can you write me some ad copy for this product
queries.reason: single ad-copy request with no moment and no ten-station pipeline ask; belongs to ad-creative or copywriting skills

queries.query: audit our Meta Ads account for wasted spend
queries.reason: a real-account audit task, not a simulated wave; belongs to ads-meta

queries.query: how do I grow my machine learning startup's user base
queries.reason: "machine" appears but as part of "machine learning", not the skill name; no moment, no pipeline ask

queries.query: generate a product photo for our new sneaker drop
queries.reason: single-image generation request, no moment framing, no ten-station ask; belongs to ai-image-generation or ads-photoshoot

queries.query: what should our pricing strategy be for this feature
queries.reason: pricing question, unrelated to creative variants or moments

queries.query: run the numbers on our Q3 budget allocation across channels
queries.reason: "run" appears but this is a budget/bidding audit, not a growth-machine wave; belongs to ads-budget

queries.query: build me a growth loop for referrals
queries.reason: "growth" appears but this is a referral-program design ask with no moment or asset x new element framing; belongs to referral-program

queries.query: simulate what happens if we raise our prices 10 percent
queries.reason: "simulate" appears but this is a pricing/finance simulation, not the machine's response-curve station

queries.query: judge whether this landing page converts well
queries.reason: "judge" appears but this is a CRO review of a real page, not the machine's asset-scoring station; belongs to page-cro or onboarding-cro
